description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, featuring a dark metallic receiver and barrel. The rifle has a curved detachable magazine, typical of the AK platform, and iron sights mounted on the top. The wood components display a reddish-brown grain, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle device. The trigger, safety lever, and magazine release are all visible, indicating standard manual operation. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where durability and reliability are essential.
description: A robust assault rifle with a reddish-brown wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. Features iron sights and a long barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel, front sight, and a glimpse of the wooden handguard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, magazine, and receiver details.
